layer_label_zh: 電源 · AI 伺服器電源 + 800V 架構

fy_revenue.vs_street: +6% vs street FY26 (AI infra power ramp)

operating_margin.vs_street: +100 bps vs street, AI mix > industrial

non_ai_contribution.note: EV + industrial automation + building OP profit

price_target.kill_condition: If AI infra power segment fails to scale > 25% of revenue by FY+2 → re-rating thesis breaks. Cut half. Two consecutive softer AI-power quarters → exit.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI infra power estimated 18–22% of FY26 revenue, rising. Conglomerate mix dilutes star score.

B_order_visibility.tier: [draft — visibility usually qualitative for Delta; need careful sourcing]
B_order_visibility.note: Target ★★★★ once 法說會 + capex announcement triangulate.

C_growth_potential.note: Rack power 30→120 kW + 48V→800V transition = step-change in $/rack.

D_cheap_to_fair.note: Auto-computed from PT vs price; gated by cycle multiplier.

E_increasing_moat.note: Power conversion efficiency + system integration + scale = compounding moat (1 of 2–3 firms globally at 97%+).

F_revaluation.note: Conglomerate discount unwinds as AI power mix becomes visible (segmentation disclosure is the trigger).

customers_named: NVIDIA reference (GB200 PSU + sidecar power) — public attribution
Microsoft / Meta / Google rack-power programs — public attribution
order_visibility.capacity_locked: [draft — Tainan + Thailand AI-power line capex; analyst to confirm named-application language]

receipts.summary_en: AI power capacity capex announcement (Tainan / Thailand). Confirm named-application language.
receipts.summary_zh: AI 電源產能資本支出公告 (台南 / 泰國) · 確認應用點名語言。
receipts.source: 公開資訊觀測站 · 重大訊息 (2308)

receipts.summary_en: Most recent 法說會: AI infra revenue % + Q+N visibility numbers + 800V program timing.
receipts.summary_zh: 最新法說會: AI 基建電源比重 + Q+N 訂單能見度 + 800V 量產時程。

receipts.summary_en: SiC / GaN / magnetics supply-chain checks confirming AI-power ramp (Wolfspeed, Infineon, ROHM order patterns).
receipts.summary_zh: SiC / GaN / 磁性元件供應鏈 (Wolfspeed / Infineon / ROHM 訂單節奏) 印證 AI 電源放量。

order_visibility.kill: Two consecutive quarters where AI infra revenue growth lags AI server unit growth (margin compression in PSU). Or hyperscalers in-source power design (rare but watch).

mechanism.en: [DRAFT ≥600 words required] AI server PSU progresses 3 kW → 5.5 kW → 12 kW per unit, with rack-level architecture moving 48V → 800V to handle GB200/Rubin-class power density. On-rack BBU + sidecar power adds further dollar content. Delta's $/AI-rack content is 3–5× legacy server power. Map per-rack content (PSU + BBU + sidecar + 800V converters) and project segment revenue against hyperscaler rack-count guidance. Note: industrial automation + EV power are the conglomerate dilution — the desk's job is to track when AI segment crosses 25% threshold and forces street re-segmentation.

moat_widening.en: [DRAFT] Efficiency at 97%+ requires SiC/GaN expertise + magnetics IP + system integration. Delta is one of 2–3 globally with all three at scale. Capacity in Tainan/Thailand compounds. Watch BYD / Inovance as the credible Chinese long-cycle threat.

revaluation_thesis.en: [DRAFT] Priced as an industrial conglomerate (EV + building + automation drag) at ~19× 5-year median. AI infra power becoming the growth driver → segment re-rating once mix exceeds 25% with margin step-up confirmed. Our 22× assumes partial unwind, not full pure-play multiple.

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler in-sourcing of power design or aggressive Chinese entrants (e.g. Wolfspeed downstream + BYD power) compressing margin. Watch BYD / Inovance segmentation.

if_kill_then.en: Cut half on margin compression > 200 bps. Exit on two-quarter trend. Move to thermal (3017) which runs on different demand curve.
